ideas.name: embed-qwen3-4b
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: A Python GPU service wrapping the Qwen3-Embedding-4B model via 4-bit transformers quantization, producing 2560-dimensional normalized embeddings over a Unix socket, permitted as a GPU/Python exception under SOUL §7.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Stores generated dense vector embeddings in memory_entries table through the db client library for later retrieval and reranking

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Embeddings produced by this service feed into the MSA-4B neural reranking pipeline as the initial retrieval stage before multi-scale attention rescoring
